claim_boundary: Factorized prefix trainer scaffold; not G005 completion evidence without full-corpus 4xH200 run, recipe-alignment audit, paper-target win, and split statistics.
recipe_alignment: public FDM-1-shaped noncausal masked-diffusion IDM with typed masked action-token planes for mouse/key/button factors.

threshold_calibration.claim_boundary: Calibration over prefix/held-out training rows only; final G005 requires split-safe calibration evidence.

button_event_threshold.rows_pruned_reason: Joint event/token calibration grid is large; committed summary keeps selected_row, top_rows_by_score, row counts, and diagnosis JSON rather than all candidate rows.
